message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'psmgr_process_ctrl' sets signal field 'psmgr_session.next_seq', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=psmgr_session;field=next_seq;offset=12] [oracle:assert=psmgr_session.next_seq stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets next_seq without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
